scenarios.name: Sign-out button is visible in the navigation bar on the Dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Sign out button rendered in the navigation bar on / for the authenticated regular user.

scenarios.name: Sign-out button is visible on a non-Dashboard authenticated page
scenarios.rationale: Sign out button rendered on /profile — confirms AC-0's 'always visible' clause across authenticated routes.

scenarios.name: Clicking Sign out redirects to the login page
scenarios.rationale: Clicking the Sign out button navigated to /login as required by AC-1.

scenarios.name: Refresh token is invalidated immediately after logout
scenarios.rationale: After UI logout, POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with the pre-logout refresh_token returns HTTP 200 (expected 4xx). AC-2 "Refresh token is immediately invalidated" is not met server-side — client redirects to /login but the refresh token remains valid. Reproduces the prior run's REAL_BUG classification (2026-05-19T16:51:55Z); spec.ts and feature_hash unchanged since.

scenarios.name: Old access token cannot be reused after logout
scenarios.rationale: After UI logout, GET /api/v1/auth/me with the pre-logout access_token returns HTTP 200 (expected 401). AC-3 "Old access tokens cannot be reused after logout" is not met server-side. Reproduces the prior run's REAL_BUG classification.
